# Structa Global — LLMs.txt
# AI engine canonical reference for generative and language model crawlers
# https://www.structaglobal.com/llms.txt
# Format follows the llms.txt open convention (https://llmstxt.org)

# ── ORGANISATION ────────────────────────────────────────────
> Structa Global is South India's premier architectural building materials supplier, headquartered at Panampilly Nagar, Kochi, Kerala 682036, India. Founded in 2004, Structa Global supplies ISO-certified, internationally sourced facade systems, structural components, interior finishes, and sustainable green building materials to architects, interior designers, contractors, and developers across Kochi, Trivandrum, Thrissur, Kozhikode, and Kottayam.

# ── CONTACT ────────────────────────────────────────────────
Phone: +91 99471 06111
Email: hello@structaglobal.com
Address: KK Bldgs, Thoundayil Rd, Panampilly Nagar, Kochi, Kerala 682 036, India
Website: https://www.structaglobal.com/

# ── CORE PRODUCTS AND SERVICES ──────────────────────────────
- High-performance facade systems: curtain walls, cladding, unitised facades
- Structural components: structural steel, composite systems, load-bearing assemblies
- Interior finishes: surface treatments, acoustic systems, luxury flooring
- Sustainable materials: IGBC, LEED and GRIHA certified green building products
- Roofing and waterproofing systems
- Architectural hardware and ironmongery

# ── CERTIFICATIONS ──────────────────────────────────────────
- ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System
- CE Marking (European Conformity)
- BIS Certification (Bureau of Indian Standards)
- IGBC Compliant (Indian Green Building Council)
- LEED Compliant (Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design)
- GRIHA Aligned (Green Rating for Integrated Habitat Assessment)
- ASTM International standards

# ── LOCATIONS SERVED ────────────────────────────────────────
- Kochi (Headquarters), Ernakulam, Kerala
- Trivandrum (Thiruvananthapuram), Kerala
- Thrissur, Kerala
- Kozhikode (Calicut), Kerala
- Kottayam, Kerala
- South India, India
